caption: A woman with dark curly hair tied in a bun and wearing black headphones and a dark green t-shirt is seated in a podcast studio. She is positioned in front of a professional black microphone on a boom arm, with her arm extending across the table towards the left. To her right is a black backdrop featuring the text "SS TALK 101", "Dr. A Unique Handle", and "ODCAST", along with the phrase "lk About It!". A logo for "BOSS TALK 101" appears in a small red and white box on the left and near the center. A blue-toned framed image of hands is visible on the wall behind her. Across the sequence, the woman maintains a consistent posture and expression, slightly closing her eyes as if listening or reflecting, with minimal movement in her facial expression or position.
